herbs.herb_desc: Aloe vera gel is a natural and soothing substance extracted from the leaves of the aloe vera plant, known for its ability to calm and hydrate the skin. Rich in vitamins A, C, and E, as well as minerals and amino acids, aloe vera gel has anti-inflammatory properties that can help to reduce redness and irritation. When applied topically, aloe vera gel can provide quick relief from sunburn, minor cuts, and other skin irritations, promoting healthy and radiant skin.
